'''Lors''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] village which helped [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] during his attempt to free [[Spinnaker/Legends|Spinnaker]] from the occupation of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].
